sections.title: Overview
sections.content: The Typeform connector integrates Shielva with your Typeform account. It syncs form definitions and form responses into the Shielva knowledge base using the Typeform API v1 (https://api.typeform.com). Each form is normalized into a ConnectorDocument of type 'form', and each response becomes a ConnectorDocument of type 'form_response'. Workspaces and insights are also accessible via dedicated methods.

sections.title: Authentication
sections.content:
The connector supports OAuth 2.0 (recommended) and Personal Access Token (PAT) as a fallback. All API requests use a Bearer token in the Authorization header: 'Authorization: Bearer {access_token}'.

OAuth 2.0 flow:
1. Register an OAuth application in Typeform Developer Apps.
2. Provide client_id and client_secret during connector install.
3. Call authorize() to obtain the Typeform authorization URL.
4. Redirect the user to that URL; Typeform returns an authorization code to your redirect_uri.
5. Exchange the code for an access_token (handled by Shielva runtime).
6. The access_token is stored in connector config and used for all subsequent API calls.

OAuth scopes required: forms:read, responses:read, workspaces:read.

PAT alternative: generate a token at https://admin.typeform.com/account#/section/tokens and store it as access_token in config.

sections.title: Configuration
sections.content:
Install fields:
- client_id (string, required): Typeform OAuth App Client ID
- client_secret (password, required): Typeform OAuth App Client Secret
- redirect_uri (string, optional): OAuth redirect URI

Post-OAuth config field:
- access_token (string): Bearer token set after OAuth flow completes

All fields are loaded from the connector config dict. Keyword arguments to TypeformConnector.__init__ serve as fallbacks for standalone/test usage.

sections.title: API Methods
sections.content:
Connector methods (all async):

install() -> InstallResult
  Validates that client_id and client_secret are present. Returns HEALTHY if credentials exist.

authorize() -> str
  Returns the Typeform OAuth authorization URL. Scopes: forms:read responses:read workspaces:read. Appends redirect_uri if set.

health_check() -> HealthCheckResult
  Calls GET /me to verify the access_token. Returns alias and email on success.

sync(**kwargs) -> SyncResult
  Full sync: lists all forms (page-based), normalizes each form as a document, then for each form fetches all responses via before-cursor pagination and normalizes each response. Accepts kb_id keyword argument.

list_forms(workspace_id=None, page_size=200) -> list[dict]
  Returns all forms, auto-paginating via page_count.

get_form(form_id) -> dict
  Returns a single form definition.

get_responses(form_id, page_size=1000) -> list[dict]
  Returns all responses for a form, auto-paginating via before cursor.

list_workspaces(page_size=200) -> list[dict]
  Returns all workspaces, auto-paginating via page_count.

get_workspace(workspace_id) -> dict
  Returns a single workspace.

get_insights(form_id) -> dict
  Returns the insights summary for a form (GET /insights/{form_id}/summary).

HTTP client methods (TypeformHTTPClient):
  get_me(access_token) -> GET /me
  list_forms(access_token, workspace_id, page, page_size, search) -> GET /forms
  get_form(access_token, form_id) -> GET /forms/{form_id}
  get_responses(access_token, form_id, page_size, before, after, since, until) -> GET /forms/{form_id}/responses
  list_workspaces(access_token, page, page_size) -> GET /workspaces
  get_workspace(access_token, workspace_id) -> GET /workspaces/{workspace_id}
  get_insights(access_token, form_id) -> GET /insights/{form_id}/summary

sections.title: Data Model
sections.content:
ConnectorDocument fields:
  source_id (str): 16-char SHA-256 hex prefix. Form: SHA-256('form:' + form_id)[:16]. Response: SHA-256('response:' + response_token)[:16].
  title (str): Form title or 'Form {id} — Response {token[:8]}'.
  content (str): Human-readable text of form fields or answer key-value pairs.
  connector_id (str): Set by Shielva runtime.
  tenant_id (str): Set by Shielva runtime.
  source_url (str): Typeform admin link for the form or response.
  metadata (dict): Type-specific fields.

Form metadata keys: type='form', form_id, form_type, created_at, last_updated_at, field_count.
Response metadata keys: type='form_response', form_id, response_token, submitted_at, landed_at, answer_count.

Answer type extraction (_extract_answer_value):
  text -> answer.text
  email -> answer.email
  url -> answer.url
  number -> str(answer.number)
  boolean -> str(answer.boolean)
  date -> answer.date
  choice -> choice.label or choice.other
  choices -> ', '.join(labels + [other])
  file_url -> answer.file_url
  payment -> '{amount} {currency}'
  unknown -> fallback scan of text/email/url/number/boolean/date keys

sections.title: Exceptions
sections.content:
Exception hierarchy:
  TypeformError (base)
    TypeformAuthError — 401/403 authentication failures
    TypeformNetworkError — 5xx server errors, connection errors, timeouts
    TypeformNotFoundError — 404 resource not found
    TypeformRateLimitError — 429 rate limit exceeded (carries retry_after float)

with_retry() behavior:
  - TypeformAuthError: never retried (requires human intervention)
  - TypeformRateLimitError: retried up to max_attempts; uses retry_after if > 0, else exponential backoff
  - TypeformError / TypeformNetworkError: retried with exponential backoff + jitter
  - Default: 3 attempts, 1.0s base delay, 30s max delay, 2.0x backoff factor

sections.title: Troubleshooting
sections.content:
401 Unauthorized: access_token is invalid or expired. Re-run OAuth flow or generate a new PAT.

403 Forbidden: Missing required scopes (forms:read, responses:read, workspaces:read). Re-authorize the OAuth app.

404 Not Found: Resource does not exist. Verify form/workspace IDs in the Typeform admin.

429 Rate Limited: The connector retries automatically. If persistent, reduce sync frequency or upgrade Typeform plan.

5xx Server Error: Typeform service issue. The connector retries up to 3 times. If persistent, check Typeform status page.

Sync returns 0 documents: No forms or no responses exist. Confirm via https://admin.typeform.com/forms.

ModuleNotFoundError aiohttp: Run: pip install aiohttp>=3.9.0
